creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Mon Mar 25 06:06:11 2013
New Revision: 315194
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/315194

Log:
  - Update to 0.4.0
  
  PR:		177245
  Submitted by:	ports fury

Modified:
  head/games/alienwave/Makefile
  head/games/alienwave/distinfo   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/games/alienwave/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/games/alienwave/Makefile	Mon Mar 25 06:05:31 2013	(r315193)
+++ head/games/alienwave/Makefile	Mon Mar 25 06:06:11 2013	(r315194)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	alienwave
-PORTVERSION=	0.3.0
+PORTVERSION=	0.4.0
 CATEGORIES=	games
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.alessandropira.org/alienwave/
 
@@ -11,14 +11,6 @@ COMMENT=	Shoot'em up game written using 
 
 LICENSE=	GPLv2
 
-WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}
-ALL_TARGET=	${PORTNAME}
-
-MAKE_ARGS=	CC="${CC}" CFLAGS="-c ${CFLAGS}"
-
-PLIST_FILES=	bin/alienwave
-PORTDOCS=	README STORY TO_DO
-
 OPTIONS_DEFINE=	RANDOM_LEVELS DOCS
 OPTIONS_DEFAULT=LEVEL_MEDIUM
 OPTIONS_SINGLE=	LEVEL
@@ -28,6 +20,14 @@ LEVEL_EASY_DESC=	Killing Xzarna: easy
 LEVEL_MEDIUM_DESC=	Killing Xzarna: medium
 LEVEL_HARD_DESC=	Killing Xzarna: hard
 
+WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}
+
+ALL_TARGET=	${PORTNAME}
+MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=	yes
+
+PORTDOCS=	README STORY TO_DO
+PLIST_FILES=	bin/alienwave
+
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MLEVEL_EASY}
@@ -42,11 +42,20 @@ CFLAGS+=	-DLEV_HARD
 CFLAGS+=	-DRANDOM_LEVELS
 .endif
 
+post-patch:
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \
+		'/^CC /s|^|#| ; \
+		 /^CFLAGS /s|^|#| ; \
+		 s|-lncurses|-lcurses| ; \
+		 /strip /s|^|#|' ${WRKSRC}/Makefile
+
 do-install:
-	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/alienwave ${PREFIX}/bin
+	(cd ${WRKSRC} && ${INSTALL_PROGRAM} alienwave ${PREFIX}/bin)
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
 	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${PORTDOCS:S|^|${WRKSRC}/|} ${DOCSDIR}
+.for i in ${PORTDOCS}
+	(cd ${WRKSRC} && ${INSTALL_DATA} ${i} ${DOCSDIR})
+.endfor
 .endif
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/games/alienwave/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/games/alienwave/distinfo	Mon Mar 25 06:05:31 2013	(r315193)
+++ head/games/alienwave/distinfo	Mon Mar 25 06:06:11 2013	(r315194)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (alienwave-0.3.0.tar.gz) = 89902193bc6d5dc13ea4acee26f5a0f72a561e9bbadd0f82e098d770d38f83ae
-SIZE (alienwave-0.3.0.tar.gz) = 22046
+SHA256 (alienwave-0.4.0.tar.gz) = 9f317cfa0fabf98e5c47dc793f6eb4dbca0b6e65e136e0661abc267ce720fc44
+SIZE (alienwave-0.4.0.tar.gz) = 21931
